Headline: #31 31st Temporary Reroute near Rhodes/32nd Place
ShortDescription: 31 31st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Rhodes/32nd Pl.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#31 31st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Rhodes/32nd Pl.

Eastbound buses will operate via 31st, King Drive, 33rd Pl., layover. 

Westbound buses will operate via 33rd Pl., King Drive, 31st and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #35 31st/35th Temporary Reroute near Rhodes/32nd Place
ShortDescription: #35 31st/35th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Rhodes/32nd Pl.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#35 31st/35th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Rhodes/32nd Pl.

Eastbound buses will operate via 35th, Rhodes, 33rd Pl., King Drive, 31st and over normal route to beach.

Westbound buses will operate via 31st., King Drive, 33rd Pl., Cottage Grove, 35th and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.
